title: Arena Hype Resonance: Minimizing the First Autocorrelation Constant
strategies: front-half block: pour uniform intensity into the first ceil(n/2) slots and leave the rest dark; reproduces the checker's naive baseline (c1 ~= 4) and scores ~0.1
uniform spread: fill every slot with equal intensity so the self-echo is a single centered triangle (c1 = 2 exactly), the strong local optimum that all smooth/analytic shapes fail to beat

peak-flattening descent: seeded soft-max (log-sum-exp) projected momentum descent on the normalized convolution peak, escaping the uniform optimum toward c1 ~ 1.55-1.97 while staying non-negative and integer-quantized, guarded to never underperform the uniform spread

different variants: two-block / notch / chirp shapes, Sidon-style sparse combs (all provably worse here), or heavier multi-restart global search that pushes further toward the open ~1.5 conjectured floor
